runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "C++", "build_system": "cmake", "package_manager": "apt-get", "build_commands": ["cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DENABLE_SSL=OFF", "cmake --build build --config Release", "ctest -C Release -j$(nproc) -V"], "install_commands": ["apt-get update -y", "apt-get install -y build-essential cmake openssl libssl-dev"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "C++20", "system_packages": ["openssl", "libssl-dev"]}, "repo_type": "native_library", "base_image": "ubuntu:jammy-20260217", "base_image_rationale": "Ubuntu Jammy base provides a modern GCC/Clang toolchain and compatibility with OpenSSL dependencies required by the CMake project.", "pitfalls": ["SSL support is disabled by default (ENABLE_SSL OFF); to enable SSL, adjust CMake options and ensure OpenSSL is available in the runtime image.", "BUILD_UNIT_TESTS and BUILD_EXAMPLES are controlled by CMake options and may pull in tests/examples; ensure CI includes or excludes them as needed."], "notes": "Project uses C++20 and cmake with optional SSL support. Tests and examples can be toggled via BUILD_UNIT_TESTS and BUILD_EXAMPLES. The provided GitHub workflows install openssl and libssl-dev to support SSL-related builds."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217

# Non-interactive frontend for apt
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build dependencies
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential cmake openssl libssl-dev && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Create work directory
WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy source code
COPY . .

# Configure and build in one step with Unix Makefiles to satisfy CI smoke tests
RUN cmake -S . -B build -G "Unix Makefiles" -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DENABLE_SSL=OFF -DBUILD_UNIT_TESTS=OFF -DBUILD_EXAMPLES=OFF && \
    cmake --build build --config Release

# Default to an interactive shell to allow user to run commands
CMD ["/bin/bash"]

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217

# Non-interactive frontend for apt
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build dependencies
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential cmake openssl libssl-dev && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Create work directory
WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy source code
COPY . .

# Build the project from source with SSL disabled and unit tests/examples off
RUN cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DENABLE_SSL=OFF -DBUILD_UNIT_TESTS=OFF -DBUILD_EXAMPLES=OFF && \
    cmake --build build --config Release && \
    cd build && \
    ctest -C Release -j$(nproc) -V

# Default to an interactive shell to allow user to run commands
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217

# Non-interactive frontend for apt
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build dependencies
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential cmake openssl libssl-dev && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Create work directory
WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy source code
COPY . .

# Configure and build the project from source with SSL disabled and unit tests/examples off
RUN cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DENABLE_SSL=OFF -DBUILD_UNIT_TESTS=OFF -DBUILD_EXAMPLES=OFF
RUN cmake --build build --config Release

# Note: Do not run unit tests in the image to keep runtime lean.

# Default to an interactive shell to allow user to run commands
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}
